# Viola — Na Gólov[y] Hair Cosmetics Store

> Viola is the online store of Viola Hehedosh — an accredited technologist of the Ukrainian niche hair cosmetics brand Na Gólov[y] (На Голову / Na Golovy). The store sells the full Na Gólov[y] product line with delivery across Ukraine via Nova Poshta. Customers receive personal expert consultation from the brand technologist.

## About

- **Owner / Brand Technologist:** Viola Hehedosh (Віола Гегедош)
- **Brand sold:** Na Gólov[y] (Ukrainian niche professional hair cosmetics)
- **Location:** Mukachevo, Zakarpattia region, Ukraine
- **Languages:** Ukrainian (uk, default), English (en)
- **Delivery:** Nova Poshta across Ukraine, 1-3 business days
- **Payment:** Card, cash on delivery, WayForPay
- **Official brand site:** https://www.nagolovy.pro/

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://violamukachevo.com/): Store overview and bestsellers
- [Na Gólov[y] brand landing](https://violamukachevo.com/na-golovy): Full brand information, product lines, FAQ
- [Shop](https://violamukachevo.com/shop): All products with filters
- [About Viola Hehedosh](https://violamukachevo.com/about): Technologist profile and salon history
- [Blog](https://violamukachevo.com/blog): Hair care articles by Viola Hehedosh
- [Delivery & Payment](https://violamukachevo.com/delivery): Shipping and payment terms
- [Contacts](https://violamukachevo.com/contacts): Phone, email, address, map

## Product lines (Na Gólov[y])

- **Shampoos:** Collagen, amino-ceramide, sulfate-free, hyaluronic, chelating
- **Conditioners:** 9-protein, exotic oils, amino acids
- **Masks:** Paraffin therapy, Diamond Gloss, polypeptide web, collagen
- **Leave-in care:** BB creams, silk, thermal protection sprays
- **Tonics & ampoules:** Multivitamin, hyaluronic
- **Scalp care:** Peels with thermal and cooling effect

## Key facts

- Na Gólov[y] is sold exclusively through accredited masters and salons — not available in mass-market retail.
- Viola Hehedosh is an accredited Na Gólov[y] brand technologist.
- All products are 100% authentic.
- Free personal consultation available online (Telegram @violagegedosh, Instagram @viola.mukachevo).
- Nationwide delivery across Ukraine via Nova Poshta.
